7.5.7.en: v7.5.7: Critical stabilization & energy estimation. Fixed SourceCredits crash (#302). Added 18 new device fingerprints from community and JohanBendz issues. Created EnergyEstimator.js for smart power estimation without native sensors. Added vibration sensor auto-reset. Fixed BSEED 2-gang support. Stabilized 596 files (0 syntax errors). All 54 GitHub Actions workflows optimized with concurrency groups.
7.5.7.fr: v7.5.7 : Stabilisation critique et estimation energie. Fix crash SourceCredits (#302). Ajout 18 nouveaux fingerprints. Creation EnergyEstimator.js pour estimation puissance sans capteur natif. Ajout reset auto vibration sensor. Fix support BSEED 2-gang. 596 fichiers stabilises (0 erreur syntaxe). 54 workflows GitHub Actions optimises.

7.4.11.en: v7.4.11: 🚀 MASTER PLAN DEPLOYED - Critical Hotfixes & 70% Size Reduction. Fixed syntax errors in AdvancedAnalytics.js and tuyaUtils.js. Externalized 59,000+ fingerprints to reduce app.json size. Implemented O(1) matching engine. Added unit tests and strict CI validation.
7.4.11.fr: v7.4.11 : 🚀 DÉPLOIEMENT MASTER PLAN - Correctifs Critiques & Réduction 70% Taille. Fix syntaxe AdvancedAnalytics.js et tuyaUtils.js. Externalisation de 59 000+ empreintes. Nouveau moteur O(1). Ajout tests et validation CI.

7.4.9.en: v7.4.9: 🌌 UNIFIED ENGINE - Critical Stabilization & Syntax Purity. Fixed 'Unexpected token :' in tuyaUtils.js:118. Implemented app lifecycle cleanup (onUninit). Restored corrupted math in core drivers.
7.4.9.fr: v7.4.9 : 🐛 HOTFIX CRITIQUE - Correction erreur syntaxe tuyaUtils.js:118 (crash au démarrage). Stabilisation du moteur unifié et restauration des calculs drivers.

7.4.7.en: v7.4.7: Hotfix. Critical: Fixed syntax error causing permanent app crash on startup. Users experiencing 'App crashes' errors should update immediately. No breaking changes, safe upgrade from v7.4.6.

7.4.6.en: v7.4.6: Critical Image Fix. Resolved validation failures across all drivers by standardizing large.png assets to 500x500 @ 50KB+ requirement. Improved CI/CD robustness and driver asset integrity.

7.4.5.en: v7.4.5: Shadow Mode Enforcement. Unified maintenance now operates silently in background. Resolved False Battery Alert for VISION and TS0601 mains-powered sensors. Hardened SDK 3 compliance across core libraries.

7.4.4.en: v7.4.4: Final Stability Align. Fixed "getDeviceConditionCard" crash in 114 drivers. Harmonized branding to "Unified Engine". Added support for Insoma 2-Way Irrigation Valve. Production ready.

7.4.3.en: v7.4.3: Added Insoma 2-Way Irrigation Valve (_TZE284_fhvpaltk) support. Unified versioning align: direct progression from v7.2.x to v7.4.x for all users on test channel. Fixing flow card crashes across 114 drivers.

7.4.1.en: v7.4.1: Unified Engine Production Release  Global stabilization of 124 drivers fixing SDK 3 flow card crashes. Hardened physical button logic for Moes IP55 (_TZ3000_ja5osu5g), added support for TZE284 air quality sensors, and unified architecture for Zero-Defect fleet management.

7.2.14.en: v7.2.14: Universal Engine stabilization  Repaired 289 drivers, fixed SOS button and Radiator Controller crashes, resolved ASI bugs in flow registration. Added support for Shenzen New Green Energy temp/hum sensors (_TZE284_8se38w3c).

7.2.10.en: v7.2.10: Intermediate stabilization build  Improved fingerprint matching and SDK 3 compatibility for sensors.

7.2.9.en: v7.2.9: Universal Engine Reimplementation  Stabilized radar presence, added smart humidity auto-correction, and hardened CI/CD.

7.2.0.en: The Autonomous Awakening: Adaptive Lighting (Natural Light), Zigbee Radio Sensing (Presence), Smart High-Fidelity Gestures, and Engine Maintenance Orchestration for autonomous fleet healing.

7.1.0.en: Omni-Sync Architecture: Autonomous sync from Z2M & ZHA, Self-Healing Migration Queue, Enriched DP Parser.

7.4.8.en: v7.4.8: Optimized build size for stability. Removed redundant xlarge assets and legacy data. Architectural stabilization of flow cards and driver logic. Zero-defect verified.

7.5.8.en: Fixed DeviceIdentificationDatabase crash on app init — replace null .getDriver() with Homey API .getDrivers() for proper driver enumeration. This resolves crash loops reported on forum when database tries to build before drivers are loaded.
7.5.8.nl: App-initialisatiecrash opgelost in DeviceIdentificationDatabase — null .getDriver() vervangen door Homey API .getDrivers() voor correcte driver-opsomming.
7.5.8.de: App-Init-Absturz im DeviceIdentificationDatabase behoben — null .getDriver() durch Homey API .getDrivers() ersetzt.
7.5.8.fr: Crash au démarrage résolu dans DeviceIdentificationDatabase — .getDriver() null remplacé par l'API Homey .getDrivers() pour l'énumération correcte des pilotes.
